name: Creamy Chicken Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a 10-inch pie crust using all the pastry ingredients. Bake for 5 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Cool.
2. In a separate pan, sauté mushrooms in butter until softened. Add chicken and green onions, and continue to sauté for another 5 minutes.
3. Pour the filling mixture into the pre-baked pie shell.
4. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, and light cream until well blended. Pour this mixture over the filling in the pie shell.
5. Sprinkle grated Swiss cheese evenly over the top of the quiche.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
Serves 6.
